name: Blitzcrank
title: The Great Steam Golem
shortBio: - Static Field (R) passive zaps nearby enemies

skins.name: iBlitzcrank
skins.description: Built as household assistance automata, thousands of iBlitzcranks were corrupted by Program during a routine software update. With their human owners oblivious to this fact, they continue to help, waiting patiently for the time their new command lines are initiated.

skins.name: Riot Blitzcrank
skins.description: A Riot Games skin obtained by either meeting a Rioter or attending an official Riot event in 2013.

skins.name: Space Groove Blitz & Crank

chromas.name: Space Groove Blitz & Crank (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2021.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2021.

chromas.name: Space Groove Blitz & Crank (Disco)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a Loot exclusive in the 2021 Space Groove event.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a Loot exclusive in the 2021 Space Groove event.

skins.description: Blitz and Crank are Cat Planet's fiercest warriors, and work together seamlessly (mostly) to pilot their mech, Blitzcrank. While Crank believes that he can overcome his lack of rhythm with the help of his exuberant copilot, Blitz is… well… he's busy dancing to his own beat. Together they plan to take over Dog Planet and claim its sunbeams for themselves.

skins.name: Beezcrank

chromas.name: Beezcrank (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2023.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2023.

skins.description: Beezcrank has a reputation for getting his bee-infantry into sticky situations. Probably because of that giant honey-comb mech-arm.

passive.name: Mana Barrier
passive.description: When Blitzcrank life is brought below 20% health they activate Mana Barrier. This creates a mana shield equal to 50% of their mana for 10 seconds. Mana Barrier can only occur once every 90 seconds.

spells.name: Rocket Grab
spells.description: Blitzcrank fires their right hand to grab an opponent on its path, dealing damage and dragging it back to them.
spells.dynamicDescription: Blitzcrank fires their right hand, dealing <magicDamage>@TotalDamage@ magic damage</magicDamage>, <status>Stuns</status> the target and <status>Pulling</status> them to themself.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Overdrive
spells.description: Blitzcrank supercharges themself to get dramatically increased movement and attack speed. They are temporarily slowed after the effect ends.
spells.dynamicDescription:
Blitzcrank supercharges themself to increase Movement Speed by @MoveSpeedMod*100@% and Attack Speed by @AttackSpeedMod*100@% for 8 seconds.

Afterwards, Blitzcrank is Slowed by @MoveSpeedModReduction*100@% for @SlowDuration@ seconds.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Power Fist
spells.description: Blitzcrank charges up their fist to make their next attack deal double damage and pop their target up in the air.
spells.dynamicDescription: Blitzcrank charges up their fist to make their next attack deal <physicalDamage>@TotalDamage@ Physical Damage</physicalDamage> and their target is <status>Knocked Up</status> for @CCDuration@ second.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Static Field
spells.description: Passively causes lightning bolts to damage a nearby enemy. Additionally, Blitzcrank can activate this ability to damage nearby enemies and silence them for 0.5 seconds, but doing so removes the passive lightning until Static Field becomes available again.
spells.dynamicDescription:
Passive: Lightning arcs off of Blitzcrank to hit a random nearby enemy for @PassiveDamage@ magic damage every 2.5 seconds.

Active: Deals @ActiveDamage@ magic damage and Silences surrounding enemy units for 0.5 seconds.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@
